reference: Hello, I have reviewed your question and understand your concerns. It is known today that pre-ejaculate contains only a minor number of sperm, so there are only rare cases where living sperm can be present in the pre-ejaculate, making conception subsequently possible. If you urinated before this, the chances of this happening are negligible. However, the only way to rule it out one hundred% is to take a pregnancy test to ease your mind. But as I can tell you, pregnancy is really not likely under these circumstances. I hope this answers your question. If you have additional questions or follow-up questions, then please do not hesitate to write to us. I will be happy to answer your questions. Wishing you good health.
text: Hãy subscribe cho kênh La La School Để không bỏ lỡ những video hấp dẫn
